name: a2ui-starter-swiftui
description: Reference client-side A2UI host built in SwiftUI. Claude-powered via direct Anthropic SDK calls (no server). Demonstrates the skeleton-first streaming pattern with progressive-rendering RFC primitives 1-3.

bundled_skills.description: Break a goal into 3 concrete first steps.
Weigh two options. Take a position.
One strong opinionated piece of feedback.

notes: Manifest shape is an experimental proposal; no host reads it today.
Intended to standardize how skill hosts declare capabilities, bundled skills, and LLM backends.
